Class UserLoginTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.users.model.UserLoginTBL
@Entity public class UserLoginTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing user login credentials and account information in the database.

This class maps to the user_login table and is the central user entity with numerous relationships to other tables including user data, devices, passwords, groups, roles, files, cookies, relationships, requests, and block lists.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • username - Unique username
  • emailaddress - Unique email address
  • passwordsalt - Hashed password
  • userkey - User key for authentication
  • active - Account active status
  • privacy - Privacy settings
  • datecreated - Account creation timestamp
